default_policy.review_rule: Network access is limited to the GEOFlow instance or channel target explicitly selected for the current task.

scripts/geoflow_preflight.sh.purpose: Read GEOFlow API v1 or authenticated-admin availability before a running-system mutation.
scripts/geoflow_preflight.sh.requires_https: required for bearer-authenticated non-loopback hosts; loopback HTTP is allowed for local development
scripts/geoflow_preflight.sh.custom_url_policy: GEOFLOW_BASE_URL must use http(s), contain no userinfo/query/fragment, and pass the script's TLS and loopback checks
scripts/geoflow_preflight.sh.auth: optional GEOFLOW_API_TOKEN stored in a mode-0600 temporary header file

scripts/build_sync_preview_report.py.purpose: Optionally ask the local GEOFlow application to read current remote channel capabilities with --live-remote.
scripts/build_sync_preview_report.py.requires_https: required for non-loopback hosts; loopback HTTP is allowed for local development
scripts/build_sync_preview_report.py.custom_url_policy: the helper reads a cached report first, allows HTTPS endpoints or loopback HTTP only, rejects userinfo/query/fragment, and blocks live mode unless signedGetJson explicitly disables redirects
scripts/build_sync_preview_report.py.timeout_seconds: enforced by the GEOFlow application HTTP client
scripts/build_sync_preview_report.py.auth: signed or configured channel request handled by the GEOFlow application

scripts/compare_default_vs_channel_front.purpose: Optionally ask the local GEOFlow application for a non-persistent live channel capability comparison.
scripts/compare_default_vs_channel_front.requires_https: required for non-loopback hosts; loopback HTTP is allowed for local development
scripts/compare_default_vs_channel_front.custom_url_policy: the helper reads a cached report first, allows HTTPS endpoints or loopback HTTP only, rejects userinfo/query/fragment, and blocks live mode unless signedGetJson explicitly disables redirects
scripts/compare_default_vs_channel_front.timeout_seconds: enforced by the GEOFlow application HTTP client
scripts/compare_default_vs_channel_front.auth: signed or configured channel request handled by the GEOFlow application

scripts/serve_preview.py.purpose: Serve the bundled sanitized static preview for local visual inspection.
